message.content:
@startuml
title AU2048 Demo Mode Button Sequence Diagram

actor User
database Model

participant MainActivity
participant Controller
participant MainActivityFragment
participant BoardView

User ->> MainActivity : Starts App

MainActivity ->> Controller : onCreate()
Controller ->> MainActivity : onCreate()

loop [wantToContinue == true]
    Press Demo Mode
    MainActivity ->> Controller : ResetClick(View)
    Controller ->> MainActivity : reset()
    Controller ->> Model : setArr()
    Controller ->> Model : setScore()
    MainActivity ->> MainActivityFragment : doesWantToContinue()
    MainActivityFragment ->> MainActivity : onCreateView()
    MainActivityFragment ->> BoardView : onCreateView()

    alt [demo == true]
        alt [button_direction == up]
            UpClick(View)
            MainActivityFragment ->> MainActivity : LeftClick(View)
            MainActivityFragment ->> MainActivity : RightClick(View)
            MainActivityFragment ->> MainActivity : DownClick(View)
        end
    end

    alt [button_direction == up]
        shiftUp()
        MainActivityFragment ->> MainActivity : shiftLeft()
        MainActivityFragment ->> MainActivity : shiftDown()
        MainActivityFragment ->> MainActivity : shiftRight()
    end

    alt [noMovesPossible == false]
        checkWin()
        win()
        reset()
    end

    alt [noMovesPossible == true]
        noMovesPossible()
        gameOver()
        Action.DOWN
        reset()
    end

    MainActivityFragment ->> MainActivity : setupArrView()
    MainActivityFragment ->> BoardView : setArrView()
    MainActivityFragment ->> MainActivity : onCreateView()
    MainActivityFragment ->> BoardView : onCreateView()

    MainActivityFragment ->> BoardView : onDestroy()
    BoardView ->> MainActivityFragment : onDestroy()

    MainActivityFragment ->> MainActivity : onDestroy()
    MainActivity ->> Model : onDestroy()

    MainActivityFragment ->> MainActivity : onDestroy()
    MainActivity ->> Model : onDestroy()
@enduml
